changeSet.author: p.meyer
changeSet.sql: create table if not exists gmdb.transcription_transcriber ( transcription_id bigint not null, transcriber_id bigint not null, constraint pk_transcription_transcriber primary key (transcription_id, transcriber_id), constraint fk_to_transcription foreign key (transcription_id) references gmdb.transcription (id), constraint fk_to_transcriber foreign key (transcriber_id) references gmdb.transcriber (id) );
